context.task_description:
Produce the L1 system architecture document. Define system components,
technology stack, integration points, and key architectural decisions.
Consult the requirements lock file (specs/<requirements-task-id>.lock.yaml)
to ensure the architecture covers all locked FRs and NFRs.

notes: L1 architecture document produced. Covers all 18 FRs, 6 NFRs, resolves all 6 open decisions. Extends existing state machine with 3 new async states.
